---
title:  
    "nucleotide-level vs protein-level parallelism"
date: 
    "May 26th, 2025"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---



```{r}

fix_count_table <- table(variants_expiii$genomic_pos[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.95 & variants_expiii$passage == end_psg])

vec <- as.numeric(names(fix_count_table))

close_diff_indices <- which(diff(vec) < 3)

# Extract the pairs (each pair: vec[i] and vec[i+1])
close_pairs <- data.frame(
    first = vec[close_diff_indices],
    second = vec[close_diff_indices + 1],
    diff = diff(vec)[close_diff_indices]
)


for (i in 1:nrow(close_pairs)){
    print(i)
    ss <- unique(variants_expiii$aa_change[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.95 &
        variants_expiii$passage == end_psg & 
        variants_expiii$genomic_pos %in% as.numeric(close_pairs[i,1:2])])

    print(ss)
}


View(variants_expiii[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.95 &
    variants_expiii$passage == end_psg & 
    variants_expiii$genomic_pos %in% as.numeric(close_pairs[25,1:2]),])


```
